excerpt: The Nasdaq rose today due to gains in technology and semiconductor stocks, while the Dow Jones fell, likely due to sector-specific declines. Market volatility persists, with ongoing shifts in investor focus.

content.introduction: The Nasdaq rose today due to gains in technology and semiconductor stocks, while the Dow Jones fell, likely due to sector-specific declines. Market volatility persists, with ongoing shifts in investor focus.
